title: potentilla supina f. villosiuscula
intro: Potentilla supina f. villosiuscula, also known as villose cinquefoil, is a variant of the Potentilla supina plant, a perennial herb native to North America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Potentilla supina f. villosiuscula include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate digestive issues, and support immune function. It can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal medicine to promote overall well-being and resilience.
